description: Argo hooks — every hook wired here runs the host-installed @argohq/toolkit directly, version-pinned by the host's own lockfile (`npx --no-install --offline @argohq/toolkit argo-hook <route>`), the same pattern tdd-guard's own hooks.json uses (`npx tdd-guard@latest`) but pinned instead of floating — this plugin checkout carries NO executable JS of its own. `--no-install --offline` guarantees zero network access: a project that hasn't installed the toolkit gets a fail-OPEN one-line warning (gates inactive, run bun install / /argo:init) instead of a hang or a deadlocked bootstrap; a genuine BLOCK verdict from an installed toolkit still exits non-zero and propagates. Routes: bash-safety-guards (dangerous-git, pipe-to-shell, bash-source-write — always on for Bash/Monitor), block-designer-spawn (Task), block-lockfile-edit (Edit/Write/MultiEdit), bash-pretooluse (red-proof, trust, design-commit gates), playbook-permission (every tool call, matcher "*", enforces an active playbook run's stage allow-list), session-context (SessionStart way-of-working card), post-edit-write (format-on-write, test-smell).

hooks.command: sh -c 'npx --no-install --offline @argohq/toolkit argo-hook block-designer-spawn; code=$?; if [ "$code" = "1" ]; then echo "argo: @argohq/toolkit not installed - hook inactive (run bun install or /argo:init)" 1>&2; exit 0; fi; exit $code'

sh -c 'npx --no-install --offline @argohq/toolkit argo-hook bash-safety-guards; code=$?; if [ "$code" = "1" ]; then echo "argo: @argohq/toolkit not installed - hook inactive (run bun install or /argo:init)" 1>&2; exit 0; fi; exit $code'

sh -c 'npx --no-install --offline @argohq/toolkit argo-hook bash-pretooluse; code=$?; if [ "$code" = "1" ]; then echo "argo: @argohq/toolkit not installed - hook inactive (run bun install or /argo:init)" 1>&2; exit 0; fi; exit $code'

sh -c 'npx --no-install --offline @argohq/toolkit argo-hook block-lockfile-edit; code=$?; if [ "$code" = "1" ]; then echo "argo: @argohq/toolkit not installed - hook inactive (run bun install or /argo:init)" 1>&2; exit 0; fi; exit $code'

sh -c 'npx --no-install --offline @argohq/toolkit argo-hook playbook-permission; code=$?; if [ "$code" = "1" ]; then echo "argo: @argohq/toolkit not installed - hook inactive (run bun install or /argo:init)" 1>&2; exit 0; fi; exit $code'
sh -c 'npx --no-install --offline @argohq/toolkit argo-hook session-context; code=$?; if [ "$code" = "1" ]; then exit 0; fi; exit $code'

sh -c 'npx --no-install --offline @argohq/toolkit argo-hook post-edit-write; code=$?; if [ "$code" = "1" ]; then echo "argo: @argohq/toolkit not installed - hook inactive (run bun install or /argo:init)" 1>&2; exit 0; fi; exit $code'
